seconds_v2.desc: Close-up of an amber glass fragrance oil bottle held in hand, its white printed Clean Scents label hand-labeled 'Stargazing 5 oz CS Cedarwood'; a second amber oil bottle and clear glass sit on a grey work surface behind it.
Camera pans down to a stack of flat-packed kraft cardboard shipping boxes; printed barcode and box code '#HD161212DW 16 x 12 x 12' are visible on the top flap.
View of folded brown corrugated boxes stacked on edge, a white plastic strap running across them and a printed barcode and size code on the side.
Continued pan across stacked flat kraft shipping boxes bound with a white strap, printed labels and barcodes facing the camera.
Close-up of a kraft box face showing a 'Box Certificate Doublewall' edge-crush-test stamp and printed code '#HD141414DW 14 x 14 x 14'.
Angled view of a tall stack of flat-folded corrugated cardboard boxes, edges fanned, with the '#HD141414DW 14 x 14 x 14' code stamped on the end box.
Camera moves over the bundle of flat-packed 14x14x14 kraft boxes, their corrugated edges and round certification stamp visible against a wooden shelf below.
Top-down pan across the fanned edges of stacked flat cardboard boxes bound by a white strap; the videographer's shadow falls across the brown corrugated surface.
Continued overhead view of the ridged corrugated edges of the flat-packed kraft shipping boxes, white strap across the top and a shadow cast over them.

windows.embed_text_v2: Pouring white packing peanuts from tray into kraft cardboard shipping box to cushion wrapped labeled candles, packaging a candle order for shipment, void fill on wood floor
windows.summary_v2: White biodegradable packing peanuts are poured from a tray into a kraft cardboard shipping box to cushion wrapped candle products for an order.

tags_v2.action: filling shipping box with packing peanuts
tags_v2.on_screen_text: village boudoir; thimbleberry jam; the lake & lemon

seconds_v2.desc: Top-down view into an open kraft cardboard shipping box on a wood floor; wrapped candle products stand inside, their small printed scent labels ('village boudoir', 'thimbleberry jam', 'the lake & lemon...') facing up at the front.
A white tray heaped with biodegradable packing peanuts enters from the left, held over the open shipping box that still shows the labeled wrapped candles at the bottom.
Packing peanuts begin pouring from the tilted white tray into the cardboard box, the first peanuts scattering over the wrapped candle product with the 'thimbleberry jam' label.
A steady stream of white foam packing peanuts pours from the tray into the box, partly covering the candle products as the void fill accumulates.
More packing peanuts cascade into the shipping box, the loose-fill spreading across the bottom and rising around the wrapped candles.
Packing peanuts continue tumbling from the tray into the box, the white loose-fill now covering most of the interior over the products.
The tray pours the last peanuts into the box, the foam fill nearly burying the candle products to cushion them.
Pouring finishes; the cardboard shipping box is filled with a layer of white biodegradable packing peanuts over the protected candles.
Top-down view of the kraft shipping box now full of white packing peanuts cushioning the candle order, ready to be sealed, on the wood floor.

Near-identical overhead of the gold lid and grey paper shred packaging in the gift box, the cream-topped black candle at left, as the shot settles before hands enter.
Black-nitrile-gloved hands reach into frame at upper right and adjust the glossy gold lid seated on grey crinkle paper inside the gift box, finalizing the candle's luxury packaging.
